title: Safety Protocol Generator
scenario: Generate a comprehensive safety protocol for a manufacturing facility with a high risk of explosion. The protocol should include emergency evacuation procedures, fire suppression methods, and personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements. The target output should be a detailed, step-by-step guide (5-7 pages) with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must be structured using a standard business document template
Must include at least 10 specific safety protocols for different scenarios

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated protocol adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The protocol covers all required safety protocols for the manufacturing facility.
The protocol is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The protocol is properly formatted and structured using a standard business document template.
